note: Exact Blender topology across five validation cases, with local bounds within 0.0007 units. Preserving the source mesh's edge-domain tail masks restores the authored bent-arrow silhouette and keeps tail length and width editable in-browser.

title: N03D · Patterned Print-Test Sphere

note: Exact Geometry Nodes parity at 16,751 vertices / 9,065 faces with identical local bounds, including the non-manifold edge tubes and tetrahedral diagnostic markers. note: Exact topology and bounds across two filament-color cases at 112,569 vertices / 225,154 faces. This 28-node graph wraps the supplied high-resolution Benchy mesh with filament material, named-attribute, and smooth-shading logic; it does not procedurally generate the boat. The web comparison preserves geometry and material assignment while normalizing the shader.

The loose String to Curves dimension annotation contributes no evaluated mesh faces in Blender or the browser. This root is shared by Cube.005 and Cube.019.

title: N03D · Layer-Height Case Preview

note: Exact authored topology and local bounds at 12 vertices / 10 faces. The 24-node graph uses two directional Wave Texture fields to deform the seed block into the sloped vice-jaw profile. Cube.008 and vice plate reuse the same root inside longer downstream modifier stacks.

title: N03D · Procedural Box
note: Complete 529-node authored storage-box assembly with exact Blender topology across all eight size, seam, height, animated-lid, and split-pin cases. Authored output is 90,928 / 87,165 and split-pin output is 83,154 / 79,693; bounds differ by at most 0.0011. Dense open-shell Exact Booleans retain the dowel-bore boundary samples, mixed-component Set Position keeps the referenced pin on the animated lid, and concave-ngon triangulation removes the former wall spikes.

title: N03D · Split n Tap
note: The supplied SPLIT N TAP object is a placeholder icosphere, so this comparison evaluates its intended nested Split n Tap WIP asset group directly in both engines. Authored output and four length, diameter, and resolution cases match Blender topology exactly; authored is 2,372 / 2,380 with X/Y bounds exact to four decimals and a 0.0006-unit maximum bound delta. The loft seam and top cap are closed. Blender's Split and part-selection inputs require missing Object/Object Parent assignments, so the browser hides those nonfunctional controls.

title: N03D · Legacy 3D Chrome Crayon
note: Exact authored topology and four-decimal bounds across the 250-node legacy crayon graph after all 1,111 Blur Attribute iterations. A second thickness case also matches Blender's bounds and all 50,810 faces with one fewer browser vertex.
